ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: This response maintains the persona of a fair-minded merchant and addresses both context relevance (theft, registry automaton) while keeping naturalness high.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Lacks immediate response to the urgency of entering the archive and does not address context relevance effectively, though it's personable in tone.
